stories.body: BREAKING: The US 30Y Note Yield rises to 5.18%, its highest level since July 2007.

stories.headline: SEC set to release innovation exemption for tokenized stocks
stories.body:
BREAKING: The SEC is set to release its so-called "innovation exemption" for tokenized stocks which will pave the path for trading digital versions of securities, per Bloomberg.

Details include:

1. In a "surprise move," the SEC is leaning toward allowing the trading of tokenized assets

2. These tokenized assets would be tradeable on decentralized crypto platforms

3. The move could "reshape the landscape of the American stock market"

4. This would also be one of the US' biggest shifts into crypto infrastructure yet

Tokenized assets are rapidly expanding.

stories.headline: Joe Rogan expresses worry about Theo Von's well-being after a Netflix taping.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan Says He’s Worried About Theo Von

Joe: "Theo had a Netflix taping and it didn't go well... I think he just had a kind of a breakdown and then said 'I'm just trying not to take my own life.' And I'm like, oh Jesus Christ, like I gotta help this dude."

Theo: "This is mostly cap. Sad to see this kinda stuff. Im doing great."

"Joe actually cares about Theo and his well-being. I think people, you know, blew it up, a lot more than what it is."

stories.headline: Intel CEO outlines 14A process as major breakthrough rivaling TSMC by 2028-2029 with advanced packaging.
stories.body: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan sat down with CNBC’s Jim Cramer to talk about Apple; Intel 14A rivaling TSMC's top chip production technology; ... (A14) is 1.4nm, this is the most advanced. ... 2028 we will have risk production. 2029 will be volume production. It will be the same time as TSMC. So that is a major, major breakthrough

stories.headline: Massive wildfire explodes in Southern California with 1,300 acres burned and 30,000 evacuated
stories.body:
🚨UPDATE: MASSIVE WILDFIRE EXPLODING in Southern California — 1,300+ Acres Burned, 30,000 People Evacuated, Thousands of Homes Threatened

Flames ripping through the area northwest of L.A. 500 firefighters battling it as residents flee in terror: “Whole area was in flames… smoke everywhere.”

Super dry conditions + years of Democrat incompetence = annual disaster.

California’s radical green policies, zero forest management, and “let nature burn” insanity have turned the state into a tinderbox every single year.

Newsom collects the highest taxes in America and still can’t stop the state from catching fire.

Prayers up for the brave firefighters and the families forced to evacuate.
